required.field: raw-sdk | langgraph | autogen | crewai | openai-agents-sdk | claude-code

forbidden.pattern: classification.needs_tools=false AND chosen_pattern in {react, plan-and-execute, tool-use}
framework_pin missing or floating (no exact version)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Substitute framework with raw-sdk if team experience matrix has zero familiarity with the chosen one.

example.code: { "task_id": "T-research-001", "classification": {"needs_tools": true, "step_count": 4, "branching": false}, "chosen_pattern": "react", "chosen_framework": "raw-sdk", "framework_pin": "anthropic==0.39.0", "caps": {"max_steps": 15, "loop_detect": true}, "tools": [{"name":"web_search","description":"Search the web","schema_ref":"schemas/web_search.json"}], "rationale": "Task needs tools (research) but step count is small (4) and no branching — ReAct on raw SDK is the smallest fit.", "rejected": [{"pattern":"plan-and-execute","framework":"langgraph","reason":"step count too small to justify graph"}], "owner": "alex@faion.net", "version": "1.0.0", "produced_at": "2026-05-22T16:00:00Z" }

example.note: f1 (no tools but react), f2 (floating pin), f3 (no caps), f4 (empty tools), f5 (no rejected).
